skills.name: unit-test-runner
skills.description: Automatically discovers and runs unit tests in .NET projects
capabilities: Locate test projects in a given directory
Execute dotnet test command with configurable parameters
Provide recommendations based on test outcomes
Support filtering tests by category or name

projectPath.description: Path to the project or directory containing test projects

filter.description: Filter expression for running specific tests

framework.description: Target framework to run tests against

skills.name: test-analyzer
skills.description: Analyzes test execution results and provides insights
capabilities: Extract test statistics from execution output
Detect build failures vs test failures

skills.name: project-discovery
skills.description: Discovers and identifies test projects in a directory structure
capabilities: Identify test projects by naming convention
Support multiple test frameworks (xUnit, NUnit, MSTest)

skills.name: continuous-testing
skills.description: Monitors projects and automatically runs tests on changes
capabilities: Watch file system for code changes
Filter tests based on changed files
